overall.description: A third-person perspective video game scene set in a post-apocalyptic rural village during a stormy dusk. The player observes an NPC digging near a wooden post before following them through muddy paths and wooden fences toward a central settlement area, where lightning illuminates the dark sky above abandoned buildings and a water tower.

events.description: NPC stops digging and stands up from the dirt mound

agents.ego_description: slowly circling around the NPC to observe the digging activity from different angles

notable_agents.action: digging in the dirt with hands, then standing up and adjusting posture

entered.detail: weathered wooden post with an attached electrical or utility box
small shed made of corrugated metal sheets
pile of freshly dug dirt next to the wooden post
simple wooden post fence enclosing the area

segments.scene_description: In a dimly lit overgrown yard, an NPC digs in the dirt near a wooden utility post. The camera circles slowly around the scene, revealing a corrugated metal shed and wooden fences. At around 10 seconds, the NPC stops digging and stands up, preparing to move.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy path between wooden sheds and fences

events.description: NPC begins walking away from the digging site toward the main settlement
moving from enclosed yard to more open settlement approach with wider view

agents.ego_description: following the NPC as they walk through muddy paths between wooden fences and sheds

notable_agents.action: walking away from the camera toward the main settlement buildings

entered.detail: small shed constructed from wooden planks with sloped roof
abandoned rusted tractor or heavy equipment on wooden supports
tall metal watchtower visible against the dark sky
two-story yellow building with multiple windows, central to the settlement

segments.scene_description: The camera follows the walking NPC through a muddy path lined with wooden fences. The scene opens up to reveal a watchtower and a large yellow house in the distance. The NPC continues walking ahead as the camera maintains a steady following distance, passing a rusted tractor and wooden sheds.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with main house and water tower during storm

events.description: lightning strikes in the distance, illuminating the storm clouds
second lightning flash visible behind the main house

agents.ego_description: moving through the village center, observing the surroundings and distant figures near the main house

notable_agents.action: standing near the main house entrance, possibly guarding or observing

entered.detail: tall cylindrical water tower silhouetted against the stormy sky
wooden cart with white tarp covering the load
small fire or light source glowing near the right side of the path
utility poles with wires stretching across the scene

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the village center as lightning illuminates the stormy sky. The main yellow house dominates the view with a water tower visible behind it. A wooden cart sits in the foreground while distant NPCs stand near the house entrance. The camera continues to explore the muddy settlement paths as the storm intensifies with multiple lightning flashes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins in a secluded, overgrown yard and expands into a stormy village center. It begins by circling an NPC digging in the dirt beside a wooden utility post and a corrugated metal shed, before the figure stands and begins to walk. As the camera follows the NPC along a muddy path lined with wooden fences, the view opens up to reveal a distant watchtower, a rusted tractor, and a large yellow house. The scene then shifts into the heart of the settlement, where the lighting becomes erratic as lightning flashes illuminate a dark, stormy sky. Finally, the camera explores the muddy village paths, passing a wooden cart and distant figures gathered near the yellow house and a towering water tower.
